title: Planet Labs PBC Full Year 2024 Earnings: EPS Beats Expectations
text: Planet Labs PBC reported the following FY 2024 metrics: Revenue of $220.7 million, representing 15% year-over-year growth from FY 2023. Net Loss of $140.5 million, with the loss narrowed by 13% from FY 2023. Earnings Per Share of loss $0.49, an improvement from the $0.61 loss reported in FY 2023. The company delivered mixed results relative to analyst projections. Revenue aligned with consensus estimates, while earnings per share exceeded expectations by 3.6%. Management anticipates revenue expansion of approximately 19% annually over the next two years. This growth trajectory substantially outpaces the projected 6.4% annual growth rate for the broader Professional Services industry. Following the earnings release, Planet Labs shares appreciated approximately 6.7% within one week.
